analysis_commentary: Second replicate of current-best params: this one COLLAPSED (max→0.9998, illegal=1.0) where the first replicate stayed stable (max=0.05, illegal=0.99). Same parameters, different seeds → collapse is seed-dominated even at the accepted-best configuration. 110 steps, first probe t=183. Confirms the accepted best was partially seed-lucky; baseline reproducibility is bimodal under build 352.
